summary: Added repository-data governance for existing ASH evidence assets without importing new raw data.

changes.purpose: Documents data layout, provenance, validation, privacy, license, and large-file policy.
Provides a consolidated manifest for tracked data and synthetic validation-output assets.
Validates manifest paths, file sizes, and SHA-256 hashes.

validation.notes: Checked 44 tracked assets with no failures.

assumptions: No new raw dataset was supplied with the instruction package.
Existing tracked data assets remain public repository evidence.
Package-derived data assets retain their existing repository provenance notes.
risks_limitations: Package-derived roadmap and sector-mixing assets do not all include separate standalone data license statements.
Future raw data still requires owner approval for publication safety and tracking policy.
next_steps: Review whether package-derived data assets need a separate license note.
Run the data manifest validator after future data changes.
Decide Git, Git LFS, or external storage policy before adding future raw datasets.
